vibe: High-End Editorial Food Magazine meets Playful Serendipity

typography.h1: font-serif text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#2C2A29]
typography.h2: font-serif text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2C2A29]
typography.label: font-sans text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#7A7571]

spacing_and_layout.layout_strategy: Asymmetric editorial. The main app container should utilize generous white space. For the roulette screen, avoid standard centered modals. Use a dynamic card stack layout taking up 70% of the screen height, with massive typographic hierarchy for the restaurant name.

components.spin_button: Massive, organic pill shape. Deep terracotta (#C84B31). Hover triggers a scale-up. Must use Framer Motion for tap effect. Add data-testid='spin-roulette-button'.
components.restaurant_card: Editorial vertical layout. Hero image takes top 60% of the card, with a max height of 60vh. Image must be crisp. Bottom 40% has white background, left-aligned text. No heavy drop shadows; use a delicate 1px border (#EAE4D9) and a very soft ambient shadow (shadow-xl shadow-black/5).
components.filters: Horizontal scrollable row of pill-toggles. Active: terracotta background, white text. Inactive: #EAE4D9 background, muted text.
components.add_form: Shadcn Form elements. Strip 'Vercel' styling: use organic soft borders (rounded-xl), generous padding, Manrope font, and earthy focus rings.
components.bottom_nav: If implemented, use Glassmorphism 2.0: high opacity white (bg-white/80), heavy blur (backdrop-blur-2xl), delicate 1px top border.

motion_and_interaction.card_reveal: Framer Motion staggered entry. When 'Spin' is tapped, cards should visually shuffle (e.g., quickly cycle z-index and slight rotations), then fly off-screen to leave the final chosen restaurant card. Add a slight bounce to the final card landing.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Interactive cards lift up -translate-y-2 and increase shadow to shadow-2xl. Buttons must explicitly set text color on hover.
motion_and_interaction.page_transition: Fade in with a slight upward translation (y: 20 to 0) using Framer Motion.

images.description: White plate with beautifully plated gourmet food
Chef pouring sauce over plated steak
Pub/restaurant set in room during daytime
People sitting on chairs inside restaurant

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Import them via Google Fonts in index.css.
IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Build the roulette interaction using Framer Motion. Create a visual 'deck shuffle' effect of cards, resolving to a single card.

IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: All interactive elements MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='add-restaurant-button', data-testid='cuisine-filter-button').
IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Adopt fluid tailwind typography and extreme generous paddings. Avoid Bootstrap-style center-everything layouts.
IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: For the 'Add Restaurant' form, heavily customize Shadcn UI components. Use our defined earthy focus rings and organic soft borders instead of default Vercel styles.

IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Overlays on images should be subtle. Never use pure black overlays; use gradient to transparent (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) on the bottom of restaurant images only if text contrast is needed.
